title: Two-Step Verification for Point Transfers
goal: To safeguard the "digital currency" of our loyalty program and prevent fraudulent or accidental point donations. By adding a mandatory confirmation layer, we provide users with full control over their balance and ensure that point transfers are intentional, verified, and secure.
description: We are introducing a 2-Step Verification (2SV) process for the "Donate Points" feature. Whenever a user initiates a transfer to another account, the system will trigger an automated security email containing a unique, time-sensitive confirmation link. The transaction will remain in a "pending" state and will only be finalized once the user clicks the link, providing a critical safety net against unauthorized account activity.
